productDisplayName: Puma Men Evo Ducati Lo White Casual Shoes
description: These stylish Evo Ducati Lo shoes from puma are great for urban wear. These shoes that carry the Ducati edge are great for regular wear since their attractive low-profile design looks great when teamed with jeans and tees for a cool casual look. Upper Synthetic leather uppers for durability and protection Mesh tongue for enhanced breathability Lace-ups for snug Fit Padded collar and tongue for greater comfort Textile lining for extra comfort Brand name appliqued on the tongue and cat logo behind collar Cupsole for added comfort Ducati brand tab on the side and embossed behind the heel Midsole Eco-friendly EcoOrtholite insole gives breathability, moisture control, anti-microbial properties, and long term cushioning EVa midsole for greater shock absorption Outsole Non-slip rubber outsole for greater traction Pivot points on the big toe mound and heel for easy 180 degree movement Flex grooves for greater flexibility of the feet
